summary: Added a read-only doctor envelope to inject-l-rule-hints so dispatch hint injection can report prerequisite and rules-source health without reading or mutating a dispatch body.

proof.summary: 14/0 assertions: info/schema/examples advertise doctor, doctor emits inject-l-rule-hints.doctor.v1 with mutates=false, existing hint injection, usage log, dedup, missing-rules passthrough, and disabled passthrough behavior still pass.
Touched shell surfaces are ShellCheck clean.
Inventory regenerated; inject-l-rule-hints.sh now reports doctor_subcommand_status=basic instead of absent.

parent_state.reason: The broader doctor-mode wave remains open; this closes one scoped dispatch-hint injection surface only.
